subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from the expression of thy steadfastness and constancy the utmost joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از بیان ثبوت و استقامت نهایت سرور حاصل گشت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Shrines and Holy places, @naming of children; of individuals
